character.definition: (same as 娠) pregnant, to let develop; to nourish; to foster; to nurture, slave girls
white color; no respect; imprudent; (Cant.) interesting, good
bull; bullock; ox (castrated), a four years old ox
(same as 處) to dwell; to abide in; to stay on; to be at rest in; to occupy, a place; an office; a department
